---
title: "main-functions"
output: rmarkdown::html_vignette
vignette: >
  %\VignetteIndexEntry{main-functions}
  %\VignetteEngine{knitr::rmarkdown}
  %\VignetteEncoding{UTF-8}
---

```{r, include = FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(
  collapse = TRUE,
  comment = "#>"
)
```

```{r setup}
library(projectr)
```

```{r}
style_gt_journal(table, title, subtitle, percent, color_col)
# Applies consistent journal-theme styling to a gt table. 
# The function adds a required title and optional subtitle, formats selected 
# percent columns, applies optional color gradients to selected columns, and 
# standardizes headers, borders, row striping, padding, and theme colors.
```

```{r}
plot_plastic_country_covid(
  data, 
  label_n, 
  label_largest_increase, 
  point_color, 
  point_size, 
  point_alpha
)
# Creates a scatterplot comparing plastic waste totals by country before 
# and during COVID. The function labels either the countries with the largest 
# increases from 2019 to 2020 or the countries with the largest 2020 totals, 
# with user-controlled label count, point color, point size, and transparency.
```

```{r}
summarize_plastics(data, type)
# Summarizes plastic type composition changes from 2019 to 2020. 
# The function uses the selected type argument to return changes in 
# proportions, year-over-year changes in totals, or both summary measures.
```
